# Fellowship

> [!abstract] ⚪ Contract · Neutral

![[21074.png]]

---

**Side A**
You cannot play non-unique allies or put non-unique allies into play. 
**Forced:** When you control exactly 9 unique characters, flip this card over.
**Side B**
You cannot play allies or put allies into play. Each character you control gets +1 WP, +1 ATK, and +1 DEF. 
**Forced:** After a character you control leaves play, flip this card over.

---

> *"I will choose you companions to go with you, as far as they will or fortune allows. The number must be few, since your hope is in speed and secrecy."*
> *-Elrond, The Fellowship of the Ring*
> *"The company of the Ring shall be Nine; and the Nine Walkers shall be set against the Nine Riders that are evil."*
> *-Elrond, The Fellowship of the Ring*

**Pack:** [[A Shadow in the East]] #74 · Limit 1 per deck
